author: doll-agent
content: Implemented encode(arr, encoding) -> Vec<Vec<u8>> and decode(byte_arrays, shape, encoding) -> StringArray<D> in a new ferray-strings::extras module. Only UTF-8 is supported (case-insensitive 'utf-8' / 'utf8' or empty for default); other encodings return InvalidValue. Decoding errors on shape mismatch or invalid UTF-8. 4 unit tests cover roundtrip, default encoding, unsupported encoding rejection, and invalid-UTF-8 rejection.
